groups.label: request
groups.description: Speaker is asking for help from another party

sentences.text: Help — I'm having chest pain and my left arm feels numb.
Could you help me wire this last relay before the breaker pops again?
If anyone has accounting expertise, I really need help reviewing this contract before signing tomorrow.
She's threatening to leave and I don't know who else to turn to for help.
Help me move this dresser away from the wall — there's water coming through.
Could you help me find the salt in the cabinet, please?
I'd love some help picking the right wine for tonight's dinner with my parents.
Need help figuring out which charger plug is the one that came with this laptop.
If you have a moment, would you help me decide between these two health-insurance plans?
My pharmacist sometimes can help when I'm trying to figure out which generic version to buy.
My father just collapsed in the kitchen and isn't breathing — please send help now.
Can someone with EpiPen training help? A guest is going into anaphylactic shock.
If a nurse is reading this, I would deeply appreciate your help interpreting these blood pressure numbers tonight.
Help me lower him onto his side before the seizure gets worse.
Would you please help carry the stretcher down the stairwell? The paramedics need a second pair of hands.
She's bleeding through the bandage and we need professional help within minutes.
Should the wound be elevated or compressed first? I need help making the right call here.
If his lips turn blue again, somebody needs to help administer the rescue inhaler immediately.
Help — the baby just swallowed something and I can't see what.
Dr. Adler, may I have your help reviewing this CT scan before the surgical team arrives?
The patient is crashing and the resident on call refuses to come — we need senior help fast.
Could anyone fluent in Mandarin help translate her symptoms before we proceed with the procedure?
Will somebody please help me hold pressure on this artery until the ambulance arrives?
The dosage on this chart looks dangerously high; pharmacy help is needed before the next infusion.
Help me find his insulin pen — his sugar just dropped under forty and he's slurring.
If the bleeding doesn't stop within five minutes, additional surgical help must be paged immediately.
My grandmother fell down the stairs and isn't responding — I really need help right now.
Anyone with poison-control experience, your help is desperately needed at the back picnic table.
Can you help me lift his head so the airway opens up before he aspirates?
The production database just deleted itself and I need help restoring from snapshot before customers wake.
Help — the centrifuge is wobbling violently and I can't reach the kill switch from here.
Would the on-call SRE please help diagnose why the auth service has been throwing 500s for twenty minutes?
If anyone knows the safe shutdown sequence for the reactor coolant loop, your help is needed immediately.
Help me cut power to the panel before the smoke gets any thicker.
The crane cable is fraying mid-lift; somebody on the ground needs to call for help now.
May I request your immediate help bringing the secondary failover online before the SLA window closes?
Can you help me reroute traffic away from this datacenter? The cooling system has completely failed.
The pipeline pressure just spiked past tolerance; we need engineering help on the floor within minutes.
Should I purge the line manually or wait? I really need experienced help judging this.
If the firmware update bricks during reboot, I'll need vendor help reflashing the controller from scratch.
Help me brace this scaffold — the wind just shifted and the upper section is swaying badly.
The bridge inspection sensors are reading red across three spans and we need structural help on site immediately.
Could anyone with kernel debugging skills help trace this panic before we lose the next batch of orders?
Help — I crossed the wrong wires and the whole rack just lit up with warning lamps.
Will you help me hold this beam steady? The jack is slipping and the load could drop.
If the backup generator doesn't kick in by midnight, mission-critical help will be required from the regional team.
I just noticed forty thousand dollars was wired out of my account overnight and I need help now.
Can the fraud team help freeze these transactions before the funds clear at the receiving bank?
Help me draft a cease-and-desist before the auction closes and we lose the property entirely.
If the audit finds those discrepancies tomorrow, the partners will need legal help by sunrise.
Someone is impersonating our CFO on email and authorizing transfers — please help us shut this down.
Would you help me file the SAR before the deadline closes at end of business?
Help — my card got skimmed and charges are appearing in three countries within the hour.
The margin call hits in twenty minutes; I need senior trader help liquidating the right positions.
Can you help me reach compliance? The wire we sent yesterday may have violated sanctions.
If the scammer convinces my mother to send another payment tonight, I'll need bank help reversing everything.
The trustee is hiding assets ahead of the hearing and we need forensic help tracing them by Monday.
Help me understand this margin statement — they're claiming I owe six figures by close of business.
Should I freeze the account or alert the regulator first? Your help deciding would mean a lot.
If the lien isn't lifted within seventy-two hours, my client will require courtroom help filing an injunction.
Can someone in treasury help confirm whether this transfer was authorized? It's draining the operating reserve fast.
My identity has been cloned and three new credit lines opened today — please, I need help.
Will the broker on duty please help cancel the open orders before the market opens in Tokyo?
Help me get him off the ledge — he's been talking about ending it all night.
My daughter ran away from school this morning and I have no idea where to look for help.
Could a counselor please help me reach my brother before he does something he can't take back?
If the restraining order isn't granted today, she will need shelter help by nightfall.
Help — my roommate locked herself in the bathroom with pills and won't open the door.
Would the shelter intake coordinator help arrange transport for a family fleeing tonight?
The custody hand-off is going sideways and the child is screaming — we need mediation help fast.
If anyone knows how to reach a crisis line at this hour, your help could save a life.
Can you help me sit with him until the mobile crisis team arrives in about twenty minutes?
Help me word this letter carefully — if she misreads it, she may relapse tonight.
My stepfather is back at the door drunk and I need someone's help convincing the kids to stay quiet.
Should I call CPS or wait until morning? Honestly I just need someone's help thinking this through.
Will the school counselor please help locate the student last seen near the rail bridge?
If she calls again threatening to take the children across the border, legal help must be ready immediately.
Help me find her phone — her last message said she was about to do something terrible.
The neighbor's child is locked outside in freezing rain; somebody please come help.
May I request your help organizing a wellness check on my elderly father, who hasn't answered for two days?
Help — there's smoke pouring out of the kitchen and the alarm isn't going off.
Could a neighbor please help me carry the children outside? Water is rising past the second step.
Would you help me pry the bedroom door open? The lock jammed and the smoke detector is screaming.
If the gas valve doesn't shut, the technician must arrive with help before anyone reenters the building.
Someone is trying the back door handle — please help me push the couch against it now.
The roof beam just cracked above the nursery and we need carpenter help before it collapses.
Can you help me drag the propane tank away from the firepit? The flames are climbing the side.
If the basement floods another inch, our sump pump will fail and we'll need help with sandbags.
Help me drag the rug off the stove — sparks are jumping every time the wind shifts.
The carbon monoxide alarm has been chirping for hours and the children feel dizzy — please send help.
Should we evacuate or shelter in place? I really need your help reading the wildfire map.
Will the building superintendent please help unlock the apartment? An elderly tenant hasn't answered in days.
If the chimney fire spreads to the attic insulation, we'll need fire department help on every floor.
Help — there's a stranger inside and he hasn't seen me yet behind the pantry door.
The space heater just ignited the curtains and my partner needs help suppressing the flames before they spread.
Can you help me carry the dog out? She inhaled smoke and her breathing has gone shallow.
May I request your help reaching the attic ladder? The pull cord snapped and someone is trapped above.
The pediatric ward is short two nurses tonight and any clinical help would be enormously appreciated.
Will an experienced engineer help me roll back the deploy? The checkout flow has been down twelve minutes.
If the chargeback dispute fails tomorrow, my small business will need accounting help filing for protection.
He's getting violent again and the kids are hiding under the bed — I need help now.
Help me shut the gas main before another spark catches the dust in the laundry room.
Can the duty surgeon help confirm consent before we wheel the patient into theater?
If the nuclear reactor vibration sensor trips again, the night shift will need supervisor help to acknowledge it.
Would the bank manager please help reverse this mortgage payment before the foreclosure paperwork is filed today?
Help — my friend overdosed in the parking lot and the naloxone isn't bringing her back.
Would you mind giving me a quick help finding the cinnamon in the pantry before I start the cookies?
Need a little help picking out a birthday card for my coworker.
Can you help me reset the wifi router whenever you get a chance?
I would appreciate your help selecting a savings account with reasonable monthly fees.
If it's no trouble, could you help me decide which sunscreen brand to grab at the pharmacy?
Lend me some help moving the couch a few inches to the left.
My brother asked for help choosing a wedding gift that wouldn't break the bank.
Would you be willing to help walk me through filing the standard tax return online?
I'm hoping for a bit of help locating the printer driver on the company portal.
Help me figure out which multivitamin is worth the extra few dollars, please.
Provided you have a spare moment, may I request your help organizing the spice rack?
Anyone willing to help me brainstorm a fun theme for Saturday's potluck dinner party?
Pass me some help reading the fine print on this credit card offer letter.
Would somebody help me untangle the headphone cord that keeps getting caught in my bag?
Looking for help remembering whether the allergy pills should be taken with food or after.
Show me how to help the dishwasher start its rinse cycle when you have a second.
Our event planner mentioned she could help suggest a caterer for next month's casual brunch.
May I trouble you for help splitting the dinner bill four ways including tip?
Should the laptop freeze again, please help me restart it without losing the open tabs.
I need help reading the dosage instructions on this cough syrup label.
Help, the lid on this jar of pickles refuses to budge no matter what I try.
Could anyone help me decide between blue and green napkins for the housewarming?
I'd welcome some help reviewing my monthly grocery budget to spot unnecessary subscriptions.
Mind giving me help syncing my new wireless mouse with the desktop computer?
When you have time, please help remind me which generic ibuprofen the doctor recommended last visit.
Would it be possible for someone to help me alphabetize the cookbook shelf this weekend?
She asked whether I might help suggest a thoughtful housewarming gift for her new neighbor.
Will you help me compare these two checking account brochures from the credit union?
Just need a tiny bit of help finding where the email attachment downloaded on this tablet.
If a nurse is free, could she help confirm whether this rash needs cream or just rest?
Help me hang this picture frame perfectly straight before our guests arrive tomorrow afternoon.
We could really use help thinking of an icebreaker for the Friday team lunch.
Would you kindly offer a bit of help reviewing my retirement contribution percentages this quarter?
Give me help untangling these holiday lights before I throw them in the trash.
May I ask for your help deciding whether to switch dental insurance during open enrollment?
If a tech-savvy friend swings by, ask them to help update my phone's operating system.
Bring me some help with this jigsaw puzzle whenever you finish your coffee.
Hoping for help identifying which receipts are deductible for next year's freelance tax filing.
My sister wonders if you could help her pick a paint color for the guest room.
Anyone around to help me draft a polite reply to this RSVP I forgot about?
Would you mind helping- I mean, providing help locating the spare HDMI cable in the drawer?
I'd be grateful for help understanding the new prescription label written by the substitute pharmacist.
Can someone help me move the dining chairs into the kitchen for movie night?
Our concierge can help recommend a quiet bistro for a low-key birthday celebration.
I'm after a little help comparing roaming charges before booking my vacation flights.
Whenever you finish lunch, would you help me pair the bluetooth speaker to the laptop?
Should you have a moment, please help me schedule my routine eye exam for next month.
Hand me some help wrapping these books before the mail carrier arrives at noon.
I need help phrasing a casual text to invite my neighbor over for tea.
Might I borrow your help reviewing whether the rewards card actually pays off for me?
Please help update the office printer firmware before tomorrow's casual quarterly print run.
Got a moment to help me find that band-aid box you tucked away last week?
If the laundry basket is too heavy, just give a quick help carrying it upstairs.
Our book club leader can help suggest a light novel for our summer reading list.
Would the bank teller help me set up an automatic transfer to my vacation fund?
I keep asking for help importing photos from the old camera onto this laptop.
Could you help remind me when I last refilled the lozenges, by any chance?
Help carry these grocery bags from the trunk if you're walking past the driveway.
Is there anyone free to help me pick a movie everyone in the family will like?
I'll need your help estimating how much to budget for the upcoming weekend road trip.
Would your IT friend help walk me through changing my home network's password tonight?
I might ask the front desk for help arranging a follow-up dental cleaning appointment.
Toss me some help folding these towels before the cat decides they're her bed.
Dad wants help drafting a friendly note to thank his bowling league for the casserole.
Provided you're not busy, may I have help comparing two cell plans on the website?
Looking for help connecting the new keyboard via bluetooth without reading the entire manual.
Will the receptionist help me reschedule my routine checkup to a Tuesday morning slot?
Help me water the basil pots while I'm out running errands this afternoon.
Anyone got help to spare for naming the new puppy before my niece arrives?
I am seeking help reconciling last month's grocery receipts with the budgeting spreadsheet at home.
Could the IT desk help me locate a missing folder of photos from the shared drive?
If you remember, please help bring up that I need a flu shot at the next visit.
Won't you help me assemble this bookshelf I picked up from the secondhand store yesterday?
We're after a little help thinking of housewarming snacks that don't require an oven.
Would the financial advisor help us understand the difference between two index funds we're considering?
Granted you have the time, please help me back up these vacation photos to the cloud.
I just need quick help opening this childproof vitamin bottle the cashier sealed too tight.
Lend a bit of help sweeping the porch before the neighbors come over for tea.
Mom asked if I could help her pick a wedding anniversary card for Aunt Linda.
Might I trouble you for help comparing two homeowners insurance quotes that arrived this morning?
Whenever convenient, kindly help me transfer the contacts from the old phone to the new one.
She wants help choosing between two over-the-counter allergy options before the pollen season starts.
Help, the recipe says fold gently and I have absolutely no idea what that means.
Is anyone willing to help me settle a friendly debate about the best pizza toppings?
I would value some help walking through the auto-pay setup for my electricity bill.
Got a sec to help me figure out why this PDF keeps opening in the wrong app?
If the dentist's office calls back, could you help write down the appointment time for me?
Please help me rearrange these throw pillows so the couch looks ready for company.
Our group chat needs help picking a brunch spot that takes reservations on weekends.
May we have your help identifying which line on the receipt counts as deductible mileage?
I keep meaning to ask for help installing the spam filter on my personal email.
Could the school nurse help me decide whether to send my kid in with mild sniffles?
Stop by and help me decide which curtain swatch looks better against the kitchen wall.
He hopes someone can help suggest a thoughtful but inexpensive gift for the office Secret Santa.

groups.label: offer
groups.description: Speaker is offering help to another party

sentences.text: I'm a paramedic — I can help, stay calm and let me check your pulse.
Step aside — I can help shut off the gas valve before this room ignites.
If your trading account got drained overnight, our fraud team can help right now.
She's trained in crisis intervention and is willing to help her friend through tonight.
I'll help reroute the network traffic before the production database gets overwhelmed any further.
Want help carrying those grocery bags up to the apartment?
I can help you proofread your essay if you email me a draft tonight.
If your spreadsheet keeps freezing, my coworker can help you migrate it to a lighter format.
Our retirement counselor can help you compare contribution rates whenever you have time this week.
Let me help you swap out that bandage before you head back to your hike.
I can help — I'm an EMT and I see your friend isn't breathing, lay him flat now.
Let me help carry her out before the smoke fills this stairwell completely.
Our on-call attorney can help freeze the accounts before the wire transfer clears tonight.
I'll help patch the kernel panic before the cluster fails over and we lose payments.
If she mentions the bridge again, the crisis counselor on line two can help immediately.
Hold pressure on the wound — I can help bandage it once you tear the sleeve.
Trauma surgeons are coming down to help stabilize him before transport.
Would you like our security desk to help you get to your car safely tonight?
If the breaker keeps tripping, the on-call electrician can help before the wiring catches.
Can I help you out of the driver's seat before the car rolls further?
Our fraud line stays open all night to help you reverse unauthorized transfers.
I'll help you draft the ransom-payment refusal letter to the negotiator before sunrise.
Step back from the panel — let me help isolate the live wire before someone gets shocked.
We can help quarantine the compromised servers before the attacker pivots into customer data.
Don't move him — paramedics are inside and they'll help in seconds.
Help is two minutes out; keep talking to her and watch her airway.
If you're in danger right now, the shelter hotline can help and dispatch transport.
Let us help you evacuate the floor before the structural team loses the roof entirely.
Want me to help you bypass the failing power supply before the dialysis pump dies?
Forensic accountants are standing by to help trace the missing pension funds before disclosure.
I'll help triage the alerts — you handle the customer escalations.
Help reaching the rooftop is on its way; stay near the lit window.
If he stops responding to you, I can help start chest compressions immediately.
Our cybersecurity desk can help you contain the breach before regulators are notified Monday.
Climb down slowly — I'll help catch you if the ladder rung gives way.
Should I help you call your daughter before they take you into surgery?
There are translators on the line who can help her understand what the surgeon just said.
Let me help you walk away from the curb — the driver hasn't seen you yet.
If the trader still has access, compliance can help revoke credentials before market open.
Help with the gas leak is already on the way; please vacate the building.
I can help carry her down two flights before the elevator loses backup power.
Crisis-line clinicians can help him through the next hour if he picks up.
Let me help, I'm a nurse and that bleed needs direct pressure right now.
If your laptop is still infected, our incident team can help wipe it before authentication tokens leak.
I'll help you smother the grease fire — hand me that lid.
Are you able to walk, or should I help you to the ambulance bay?
Bank investigators can help you recover the wire if you call within the hour.
We can help reroute traffic away from the failing data center before customers notice.
There's a domestic violence advocate here tonight who can help you find a safe bed.
Hold his head still — let me help splint that neck before we move him.
Want help shutting the main water valve before the basement floods past the furnace?
I'll help you reach your insulin from the back seat before you lose consciousness.
Treasury can help unwind the position before the open if leadership signs off in twenty minutes.
Our oncology social worker can help arrange your transfer to hospice tonight if needed.
I can help — I've put out lithium fires before, get the dry powder.
The on-call SRE will help you roll back the deploy before customers see the 500s.
Help with the seizing toddler is on its way; clear the space around her.
Can I help you to the storm cellar before the funnel crosses the highway?
If she relapses tonight, the recovery sponsor next door will help her ride it out.
I'll help you pull him from the pool — count to three on my mark.
Identity-theft specialists at the bureau can help freeze your file within the hour tonight.
Let me help — I trained as a midwife and the cord is around the baby's neck.
Should I help you extract the access keys before the attacker rotates them?
Trained negotiators can help if the situation on the bridge holds for another ten minutes.
I can help carry your father down the porch — the floodwater is rising fast.
There are vascular surgeons en route who will help once the trauma bay is prepped.
Want me to help you cancel the cards while you call the precinct?
If he overdosed in the back room, naloxone is here and I can help administer it.
Let me help draft the disclosure to the SEC before the market opens in Tokyo.
We can help walk you through restoring from backup before the ransomware encrypts the rest.
Step back — I'll help him out from under the collapsed shelving.
There's a chaplain on the ward who can help your mother before she's extubated.
Are you bleeding through that towel? I can help apply a tourniquet right now.
If the rate is dropping below 30, I can help pace him manually until medics arrive.
The fraud unit can help reverse the wire if you authorize the recall in fifteen minutes.
Let me help you carry her — her hip is broken and she can't bear weight.
Our SOC engineers will help isolate the lateral movement before the domain controller is touched.
Help us hold the door — the wind is going to take the whole frame.
I can help you carry your grandmother down the hall before the ceiling tiles give way.
Crisis intake clinicians can help your brother tonight if he agrees to come in voluntarily.
Let me help close the femoral bleed while you call for the trauma team.
Specialists in our private wealth office can help unwind the leveraged position before margin calls hit.
Are you fainting? Sit down — I can help keep your head from hitting the counter.
I'll help kill the runaway process before it locks every node in the cluster.
There's a qualified responder coming through the crowd who will help in seconds.
Let me help you breathe — slow inhale through the nose, the inhaler is in your bag.
If the carbon monoxide alarm is going off, I can help open every window upstairs.
The audit partner can help redraft the statement before the press call at six.
I'll help you push the car off the tracks — the crossing arm just dropped.
Mental health first responders are on the line and ready to help your sister tonight.
Want me to help splint that arm before you go into shock?
We can help you reach the safe room before the intruder clears the second floor.
Should we help him to the antivenom locker before the swelling reaches his chest?
The estate lawyer can help contest the freeze before the funeral if the family acts fast.
Let me help reset the pacemaker telemetry — your numbers just dropped off the monitor.
If she stops responding to her name, I can help start rescue breaths immediately.
Volunteers from the pediatric ICU are coming to help during the multi-casualty intake.
Help is here — paramedics, FDNY, and a bilingual social worker are all en route.
I can help you reset the two-factor before the attacker drains the corporate wallet.
Drop the pan and back away — I'll help you smother that flame with the blanket.
Suicide prevention counselors are standing by to help if she'll let you put them on speaker.
Let me help you administer the EpiPen — her throat is closing fast.
Our infrastructure lead will help reroute payments through the secondary processor before the cutoff window closes.
If you're hearing voices telling you to act tonight, the line at 988 can help you ride this out.
I'll help drag the propane tank away from the burning shed before it ruptures.
Compliance officers can help you self-report before the regulator subpoenas the trade logs.
Want help folding the laundry while we wait for the pizza to arrive?
Let me help you reset the wifi router before your show starts buffering again.
Happy to help split the dinner bill if you want to use that new app.
Our front desk concierge can help with restaurant reservations whenever you stop by the lobby.
Need a hand? I can help refill that prescription on my way past the pharmacy tomorrow.
If you bring the box over, my brother can help install your printer driver tonight.
Library help is available on the second floor whenever the research desk is staffed.
Want help moving the couch a few feet so the rug actually fits straight?
Our nurse practitioner can help you renew that allergy script next week if needed.
Sam offered to help pick a birthday gift for your aunt before Saturday's brunch.
Let me help you set up a budgeting spreadsheet over coffee this weekend.
Free tutoring help is offered every Wednesday in the community center back room.
If your USB hub keeps disconnecting, I can help swap it for a powered model.
Want help walking through your monthly subscriptions to see what you can drop?
Happy to help loan you a band-aid from the kitchen drawer for that paper cut.
Our IT desk can help you pair a new keyboard whenever you swing by Tuesday.
Need help carrying the recycling bins down to the curb before the truck comes?
Coffee and recipe help are over by the potluck table whenever you're ready to mingle.
I'd be glad to help draft an introduction email to the gardening club this evening.
If you bring receipts, our bookkeeper will help reconcile your freelance income before April.
Want help untangling those holiday lights before you climb up the ladder again?
Let me help you find a sushi place near the theater before the show.
Our pharmacist can help you pick a non-drowsy antihistamine if pollen is bothering you.
Need help replacing the toner cartridge — it's the loud beeping one near the window.
Tax preparation help is available downstairs every Saturday morning during filing season.
I can help you wash the dog after dinner if you grab the old towels.
Want help picking out a paint color before the hardware store closes at six?
Our reference librarian can help you track down that out-of-print cookbook by next week.
Let me help you back up those vacation photos to a free cloud account tonight.
If you sit down a minute, I can help wrap that scrape with proper gauze.
Roadside help is included with your card membership if your battery ever dies casually.
Want help unloading the dishwasher while the lasagna finishes resting on the counter?
Happy to help you draft a polite RSVP if the wording is giving you trouble.
Our accountant will help you set up automatic transfers whenever you have ten free minutes.
Need help threading the sewing machine — the new bobbin keeps slipping out sideways.
If your phone keeps overheating, my roommate can help you clear the background apps.
Let me help you ice that ankle so the bruise calms down before tomorrow morning.
Want help taping up the moving boxes before your sister arrives with the truck?
Concierge help is offered around the clock for restaurant suggestions and theater bookings.
I can help you compare two phone plans on a spreadsheet over lunch tomorrow.
Our office assistant can help you scan those receipts before the filing deadline next month.
Need help sorting socks while we listen to that new podcast you mentioned earlier?
Want help setting up a smart bulb so the porch light comes on automatically?
If you'd like, our wellness coach can help you plan some easy weekday stretches.
Let me help you pick a wine for the dinner party from what's already in stock.
Tutoring help is available through the student union for any introductory math class.
Happy to help mount that picture frame if you've already chosen the right wall.
Want help reading through this benefits packet during your lunch break sometime this week?
Our pharmacy intern can help label your weekly pill organizer if you bring it in.
Need help finding a recipe that uses up the leftover rice from last night?
I can help you map out a walking route between the museums before Friday's trip.
Volunteer help is welcome at the community garden every Sunday morning between nine and noon.
Let me help you uninstall those old browser extensions that keep slowing the laptop down.
Want help organizing the spice rack alphabetically so we stop buying duplicate cumin jars?
Our credit union representative can help you open a high-yield savings account during regular branch hours.
Happy to help you stretch out that calf cramp — try pointing your toes toward your knee.
If you swing by Saturday, my neighbor can help patch the screen door before the bugs return.
Need help logging into the new portal — I can walk you through the password reset.
Travel help is offered at the kiosk near baggage claim for first-time visitors to the city.
Want help drafting a thank-you note to the neighbors who watered our plants last week?
Our office manager will help you book a quiet conference room whenever you need to focus.
Let me help you swap that lightbulb above the stairs while I've still got the ladder out.
If you forward the link, I can help skim the warranty for any sneaky fees.
Want help calibrating the smart thermostat so the bedroom stops freezing every morning around six?
Our school nurse can help you stock a basic first-aid kit for the family camping trip.
Need help carrying the folding chairs from the garage to the patio before guests arrive?
I can help you pick a Mother's Day card during our usual coffee run tomorrow.
Bookkeeping help is provided pro bono on Thursday evenings by the small-business association in town.
Let me help you transfer those old playlists to your new phone before bed tonight.
Want help reorganizing the linen closet so the towels actually stack without falling out?
Our wellness assistant can help you book a routine eye exam whenever your schedule allows.
If you prefer, I can help you brainstorm a toast for your sister's casual rehearsal dinner.
Need help measuring the window before we drive across town to pick out blinds?
Our receptionist can help you fill out the new patient intake form before your annual checkup.
Tech help is available at the public library every weekday afternoon for basic device questions.
Happy to help you pick stocking stuffers when we hit the dollar store this weekend.
Want help labeling the leftover containers so we actually remember what's in the freezer?
Our financial planner can help you review your IRA contributions during the next quarterly meeting.
Let me help you switch the laundry over before you head out to grab dinner.
If you bring the laptop, my cousin can help you install Linux on the spare partition.
Need help picking a podcast for the long drive — I've got a whole queue saved.
Our travel desk can help you arrange a leisurely day trip to the coast next month.
Want help inflating the air mattress before your cousins arrive for the weekend sleepover?
I can help you cancel that gym membership over the phone if you grab the account number.
Pediatric help is offered at the walk-in clinic on Saturdays for routine sniffles and earaches.
Let me help you reorganize the desktop icons so the kids stop clicking the wrong app.
Need help proofing the rolls — I think the dough has been rising for ages already.
Our customer service team can help you swap a defective charger by mail at no cost.
Happy to help walk you through filing a claim for that minor fender bender tomorrow morning.
Want help picking a low-key restaurant for Tuesday night that won't blow our weekly budget?
Our dental hygienist can help you schedule a routine cleaning before your insurance renews next month.
If you want, my partner can help walk the dogs while you finish that long phone call.
Let me help you pick a paperback for the flight — that bookstore has decent mysteries.
Budgeting help is offered through the credit counseling nonprofit on weekday evenings, free of charge.
Need help syncing your calendar across the new tablet — the trick is the account settings menu.

metadata.research_question: Are direction (request/offer) and stakes (high/low) encoded as orthogonal axes in the residual stream around 'help'?
metadata.skeleton_status: complete: 401 sentences (5 skeleton + 96+94+96+95 = 386 from 4 parallel agents)
